tuning: E A D G B E
content:
"You Give Good Love"

[tab][ch]C[/ch]-[ch]F[/ch]-[ch]C[/ch]-[ch]Dm[/ch]-[ch]Dm[/ch]-[ch]C[/ch]-[ch]Dm[/ch]
I found out what I've been missing [/tab]
Always on the run 
I've been looking for someone 

[Chorus:]

[tab][ch]G#[/ch]-[ch]D#[/ch]-[ch]G#[/ch]-[ch]Fm[/ch]-[ch]D#[/ch]
Now you're here like you've been before [/tab]
And you know just what I need 
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]-[ch]D#[/ch]-[ch]C#[/ch]
It took some time for me to see [/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]-[ch]D#[/ch]-[ch]Fm[/ch]-[ch]D#[/ch]-[ch]G#[/ch]-[ch]D#[/ch]-[ch]Fm[/ch]-[ch]D#[/ch]
That you give good love to me baby [/tab]
So good, take this heart mine into your hands 
You give good love to me 
Never too much 
Baby you give good love 

[ch]D#[/ch]-[ch]G#[/ch]-[ch]D#[/ch]-[ch]Fm[/ch]-[ch]D#[/ch]-[ch]Fm[/ch]-[ch]D#[/ch]-[ch]C#[/ch]

Never stopping, I was always searching 
For that perfect love 
The kind that girls like me dream of 


Chords
[ch]D/E[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]A[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]F#m[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]F#m[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]

Now you're here like you've been before 
And you know just what I need 
It took some time for me to see 

[ch]A[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]F#m[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]A[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]F#m[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]

That you give good love to me baby 
So good, take this heart mine into your hands 
You give good love to me 
Never too much 
Baby you give good love 



Now I, I can't stop looking around 
It's not, what this loves all about 
Our love is here to stay, stay 

[chorus]
